name: mushi-mushi-vscode
description: Your AI wrote it. Mushi tells you why it broke. One-click MCP server for bug triage, evidence, blast radius, and fix dispatch — right inside VS Code agent mode.

commands.title: Mushi Mushi: Use the read-only demo (no signup)

mushiMushi.transport.markdownDescription: Which MCP transport to register. `stdio` runs `npx @mushi-mushi/mcp` locally; `http` connects to the hosted Streamable HTTP endpoint.

mushiMushi.endpoint.markdownDescription: Mushi API base URL (`MUSHI_API_ENDPOINT`) used by the stdio transport. Point this at your self-hosted Supabase edge functions if you are not on Mushi Cloud.

mushiMushi.mcpHttpUrl.markdownDescription: Hosted Streamable HTTP MCP URL used by the `http` transport.

mushiMushi.projectId.markdownDescription: Optional Mushi project UUID. Sent as `MUSHI_PROJECT_ID` (stdio) or `X-Mushi-Project-Id` (http).

mushiMushi.features.markdownDescription: Comma-separated MCP feature groups to expose (lean default mirrors the Mushi CLI). Use `all` for every tool.

mushiMushi.useDemo.markdownDescription: Use the public, read-only demo project (no signup). Forces `?read_only=1` and a safe feature subset. Set `mushiMushi.demoApiKey` to the published demo key.

mushiMushi.demoApiKey.markdownDescription: Public `mcp:read` demo key used when **Use demo** is enabled. Intentionally public and rotatable; never grants access to real user data.
